silence.translate: молчание, тишина, безмолвие, забвение, заставить замолчать, заглушать
mnemonic:
silence ['saɪləns]
***
Ты в МОЛЧАНИИ своём универсален (с). (это) silence
ЗАМОЛЧИ - будь универсален (с). (это) silence

examples.eng: We sat in deadly silence.
A scream broke the silence.
We waited in silence.
Silence is better than unmeaning words
His silence implied consent.
The silence began to weigh on us.
The four men sat in silence.
They sat in complete silence.
A long silence fell between us.
examples.ru: Мы надолго замолчали. / Мы долго не говорили ни слова.

examples.eng: We were received in silence.
The professor asked for silence.
We sat there in dead silence.
I was pledged to silence.
The monks take a vow of silence.
He waited in silence until I came across with the truth.
examples.ru: Он молча ждал, пока я не расскажу правду.

examples.eng: A scream pierced the silence.
Peeved at his silence, she left.
examples.ru: Обидевшись на его молчание, она ушла.

examples.eng: a few moments of blessed silence
I sat in silence, unheeding and unseeing all around me.
examples.ru: Я сидел молча, ни на что не обращая внимания и ничего не замечая вокруг себя.

examples.eng: There was a loaded silence.
Mavis ate her meal in silence.
He received the news in silence.
There was an embarrassed silence.
A deathly silence filled the room.
A long silence followed her reply.
examples.ru: За её ответом последовало долгое молчание.

examples.eng: A heavy silence fell upon the room.
Everyone was sworn to secrecy / silence.
Silence fell as I entered the room.
examples.ru: Когда я вошёл в комнату, наступила тишина.

examples.eng: The audience sat in stunned silence.
A loud scream shattered the silence.
